secondary_diagnostics_text:
numeric_threshold_not_in_law_text (secondary — fix even if cardinality is primary):
  - Rule rules[7].if[0].and[2] uses numeric threshold 13500000, not in scoped law text.
  - Rule rules[8].if[0].and[2] uses numeric threshold 7200000, not in scoped law text.
  Allowed law-text thresholds: 26, 38, 50, 1996, 2002, 6000000, 11250000
Also fix these numeric threshold provenance issues.
missing_helper_definition (legal-effect context=True):
  helper: adjusted_turnover_threshold (signature=Company * FinancialYear -> Real; kind=threshold; hints=threshold)
  repair: define 'adjusted_turnover_threshold' in THEN with rules, or reclassify as case_input/background only if safe; do not rename without defining.
  threshold hint: prefer pairwise/conjunctive THEN definitions ((A&B) OR (A&C) OR (B&C)) for more-than-one helpers.
  threshold helper candidates:
    - employee_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - turnover_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_two_consecutive_years (helper)
    - no_longer_exceeds_more_than_one_criterion_two_consecutive_years (helper)
  temporal relation candidates:
    - previous_financial_year (observable)
    - next_financial_year (observable)
  other lower-level symbols:
    - turnover_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - revenues_majority_non_turnover (observable)
    - annual_net_turnover_excl_vat (observable)
    - alternative_turnover (observable)
    - consolidated_net_turnover (observable)
    - employee_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded (helper)
    - more_than_one_criterion_exceeded (helper)
